creator: bob@vesterman.com
text: For what it's worth, I tried installing on a different machine (this one running 14.0-RELEASE-p7), and it's working fine there, using *almost* the exact same configuration: The only difference is that rather than listening on 127.0.0.1, I have it listening on * (since unbound is still running on the other machine, and needs to get to nsd).
